category_sources: source_facts.description says TCP port redirector for UNIX; official GitHub README describes redir listening on one port and forwarding to another.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is redir; official GitHub README and executable use redir.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents usage; official repository includes the redir.1 man page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/troglobit/redir; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
